title: mclient is unaware of merge tables and remote tables
poc: ALTER TABLE mt1 ADD TABLE t1;
key_bug_features: mclient fails with merge and remote table operations
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (i INT, j VARCHAR(50), k DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE);
CREATE TABLE mt1 (m INT, n FLOAT, o BOOLEAN);
ALTER TABLE mt1 ADD TABLE t1;
INSERT INTO t1 (i, j) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL);
SELECT * FROM mt1 JOIN t1 ON mt1.m = t1.i WHERE t1.j IS NOT NULL;
